headline: Nacha Welcomes 20 New Payments Innovation Alliance Members in First Quarter of 2026
summary: RESTON, Va., April 02, 2026--Nacha today announced 20 organizations have joined the Payments Innovation Alliance during the first quarter of 2026, marking a significant expansion of the cross‑industry network that collaborates on innovation, education and operational improvements across the payments ecosystem.
